'''Belvarian firegnats''' were glowing [[Fire gnat/Legends|insects]] from the [[Belvaria system/Legends|Belvaria system]] that flew in swarms. They blinked red and green.

{{Creature-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}}
